result.markdown:
---
title: "QuartoからStataを使う"
date: 2026-07-04
categories: [R]
---

仕事でStataを使う必要があったのでメモ

## 参考にしたページ

- Stataをモダンな環境で使う <https://zenn.dev/nicetak/articles/stata-modern-2025>
- nbstata <https://hugetim.github.io/nbstata/>

## 環境構築

- pythonを使うので、事前にvenvなどで仮想環境をつくっておく
- 以下のコマンドで必要なパッケージとカーネルをインストールする
  - 公式サイトを見ると`pip install nbstata`だけになっているが、自分の環境では他のも必要だった

```bash
pip install nbstata pyyaml nbformat nbclient
python -m nbstata.install
```

## 初期設定

- jupyterのマジックコマンドのような形で、いくつか初期設定が可能
- ここではグラフの画像形式をsvgにしておく
- 詳しくは
  - <https://hugetim.github.io/nbstata/user_guide.html#configuration-optional>
  - <https://hugetim.github.io/nbstata/user_guide.html#set-set>

::: {#7cee2a36 .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
%set graph_format = svg
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
```{=html}
<style>div.jp-Notebook .datagrid-container {min-height: 448px; }</style>
```
:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```
graph_format was png, is now svg
```
:::
:::


## 実際に使ってみる

### データの読み込み

::: {#54aa9146 .cell execution_count=2}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
sysuse census, clear
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```
(1980 Census data by state)
```
:::
:::


### 変数一覧を表示

::: {#90724784 .cell execution_count=3}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
describe
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```

Contains data from /Applications/Stata/ado/base/c/census.dta
 Observations:            50                  1980 Census data by state
    Variables:            13                  6 Apr 2024 15:43
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Variable      Storage   Display    Value
    name         type    format    label      Variable label
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
state           str14   %-14s                 State
state2          str2    %-2s                  Two-letter state abbreviation
region          int     %-8.0g     cenreg     Census region
pop             long    %12.0gc               Population
poplt5          long    %12.0gc               Pop, < 5 year
pop5_17         long    %12.0gc               Pop, 5 to 17 years
pop18p          long    %12.0gc               Pop, 18 and older
pop65p          long    %12.0gc               Pop, 65 and older
popurban        long    %12.0gc               Urban population
medage          float   %9.2f                 Median age
death           long    %12.0gc               Number of deaths
marriage        long    %12.0gc               Number of marriages
divorce         long    %12.0gc               Number of divorces
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sorted by: 
```
:::
:::


- チャンクオプションは`*| echo: false`のような形（コードブロックが非表示になる）

::: {#cccc50d3 .cell execution_count=4}

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```

Contains data from /Applications/Stata/ado/base/c/census.dta
 Observations:            50                  1980 Census data by state
    Variables:            13                  6 Apr 2024 15:43
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Variable      Storage   Display    Value
    name         type    format    label      Variable label
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
state           str14   %-14s                 State
state2          str2    %-2s                  Two-letter state abbreviation
region          int     %-8.0g     cenreg     Census region
pop             long    %12.0gc               Population
poplt5          long    %12.0gc               Pop, < 5 year
pop5_17         long    %12.0gc               Pop, 5 to 17 years
pop18p          long    %12.0gc               Pop, 18 and older
pop65p          long    %12.0gc               Pop, 65 and older
popurban        long    %12.0gc               Urban population
medage          float   %9.2f                 Median age
death           long    %12.0gc               Number of deaths
marriage        long    %12.0gc               Number of marriages
divorce         long    %12.0gc               Number of divorces
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sorted by: 
```
:::
:::


### グラフを書いてみる

- 都市人口率と高齢化率を計算

::: {#28eb3818 .cell execution_count=5}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
gen pop65_prop = pop65p / pop
gen popurban_prop = popurban / pop
```
:::


- 散布図を表示

::: {#e81f94cb .cell execution_count=6}
``` {.stata .cell-code}
scatter pop65_prop popurban_prop
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display}
![](quarto-with-stata_files/figure-html/cell-7-output-1.svg){}
:::
:::
